entries.intro_block:
Thu 25 Jun — run, 16:57 start, 46:03
Conditions: 27°C, wind 19 km/h N, 54%, partly cloudy. Hot again (not quite as hot as last time), cold breeze.
Course: familiar route, usual incline heading towards home
Pre: 2 scoops Tailwind
During: water
Kit: Hoka Cliftons
Body: legs stiff all day, nothing painful
entries.feedback_text:
Slightly different course, but a familiar route with the usual incline heading towards home.

The run was another hot one, although probably not as hot as the previous one, with a cold breeze. My legs have felt a little bit stiff all day today.

The session was done as prescribed. Interesting that when I saw it was only 45 minutes I was like, oh, I can do longer than that, but by the end of it I was glad it was only 45 minutes.

Today was just one of those runs that wasn't comfortable. I guess I must have had some good ones recently, but the legs were just a little bit stiff today. Nothing painful, just stiff and not comfortable feeling.

With such a tight bandwidth today, it was challenging to settle into a pace.

I did try and focus more on feel today rather than pace, and I think I did pretty well at that. You'll see the last block, which was on the incline. The pace was slower, but I felt that the effort was consistent with the rest of the session.

I was quite pleased that the chilled sessions did seem to allow me to recover. Sometimes in the past I've felt that the chilled sessions, even running at such a slow pace, haven't given me the time to recover.

I finished feeling OK and pleased I'd done it. Not the best run ever, but a nice change to what I normally do.
entries.headline: Yaiza Run — 6.06 km in 46:03 — avg 7:36/km — HR 130/149
